page.title: Checkout | VNSEEA
page.description: Complete your marketplace checkout with the shipping address form, cart, wallet balance, and total payment.
page.layoutDescription: Fill in the delivery address, verify the cart, and choose a payment method before confirming your order.

summary.title: Shopping Cart
summary.insufficientBalance: You do not have enough balance to make a purchase, please top up your wallet before continuing with this method.
summary.walletBalance: Wallet has {balance}. You need to top up {amount} more to continue the purchase.
summary.walletHint: Current wallet balance is {balance}. This UI follows the internal mock checkout using the internal wallet.
summary.emptyCartHint: Please go back to the marketplace to select more products before continuing checkout.

shippingForm.savedAddressDesc: The order will prioritize this address, you can still modify the form below.
shippingForm.noAddressDesc: Quickly fill in the form below so the system has enough delivery information for this order.
shippingForm.addAddressHint: Please add a new address below to continue.
shippingForm.fieldsRemaining: Fill in all {count} fields to enable the save address button.
shippingForm.shippingInfoPersist: Shipping information will be kept for further checkout steps.
shippingForm.formDesc: The form has been grouped by info clusters for faster desktop operation while remaining compact on mobile.
shippingForm.recipientInfoDesc: Enter name and phone number for easier courier contact.
shippingForm.regionDesc: Fill in location for precise delivery point aggregation.
shippingForm.pointDetailDesc: Clearly state house number, street name, ward/commune to avoid failed delivery.
shippingForm.mockWarning: The order will use the exact information you save here. This is a mock UI so it hasn't sent real data to API `address.php`.

page.title: My Orders | VNSEEA
page.description: Track your purchases, shipping status, and overview of your marketplace orders on VNSEEA.
page.layoutDescription: Track marketplace purchases, check delivery status, and reopen order details when needed.
page.detailDescription: Track order status, check delivery information, and review all products in the transaction.
page.customerDescription: Follow a specific sale, check buyer information, and prepare shipment update steps.

pending.label: Pending
pending.description: The order has just been placed and is waiting for shop confirmation.

shipping.label: Shipping
shipping.description: The order has left the warehouse and is on its way to you.

delivered.label: Completed
delivered.description: The order has been delivered successfully and can be reviewed.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.description: Orders that were cancelled or refunded to your internal wallet.

sidebar.flowHintReal: Data updated from VNSEEA marketplace system.
sidebar.flowHintMarketplace: System automatically syncs shipping status from partners.
sidebar.helpAction: Please contact VNSEEA buyer support center.
sidebar.tasksAction: Go back to the order list to open the order you want to track.
sidebar.sellerTasksAction: Go back to the seller area to open the customer order you want to process.

placed.label: Placed
placed.description: You have successfully submitted the purchase request.

processing.label: Shop Processing
processing.description: The seller is preparing and confirming your order.

shipping.label: Shipping
shipping.description: The order has been handed over to the shipping unit.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: You have received the goods and the order is successfully closed.

detail.noNote: This order has no additional notes.
detail.notFoundDesc: This order code does not exist in the current mock data. Please go back to the order list to select another one.
detail.sellerNotFoundDesc: This order ID does not exist in current seller mock data. Go back to products to open another.
detail.noBuyerNote: The customer left no additional notes.
detail.noInternalNote: No internal notes for this order yet.
detail.cancelledWarning: The order was cancelled so you cannot continue to update `Shipped` or `Completed`. Please save notes and close the refund file.
detail.shippedDesc: Use when the order has been labeled and handed over to the shipping unit.
detail.completedDesc: Use when the customer has received all goods and the order is eligible for payout closing.

queued.label: Queued
queued.description: Funds are on hold until the order is completed.

processing.label: Processing
processing.description: Payout is being processed and transferred to shop wallet.

completed.label: Completed
completed.description: Funds have been added to the shop's available balance.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.description: The payout has been cancelled due to order error/return.

empty.noMatchedDesc: Try changing filters or search keywords. When you buy a new product, orders will appear here.

created.label: Order created
created.description: The order has been recorded and is waiting for shop confirmation.

confirmed.label: Shop confirmed
confirmed.description: The shop will check inventory and prepare your order.

shipping.label: Handed over to shipping
shipping.description: The order will be handed over to the shipping unit after confirmation.

delivered.label: Delivered successfully
delivered.description: You will receive a notification when the order is completed.

shipping_active.label: Shipping
shipping_active.description: The order is on the delivery truck and will arrive today.

cancelled.label: Cancellation request
cancelled.description: The buyer submitted a cancellation request before confirmation.

refunded.label: Refunded & closed
refunded.description: The funds have been refunded to the internal VNSEEA wallet.

payment.label: Verify payment
payment.description: Internal wallet has recorded success or funds have reached the system.

stock.label: Check inventory
stock.description: Ensure sufficient quantity, accessories, and packaging condition.

packing.label: Pack & Print label
packing.description: Must be completed before handing over to the shipping unit.

handoff.label: Handover to shipper
handoff.description: The system will open payout after the order leaves the warehouse.

delivery.expected2h: Shop expected to confirm in 2 hours
delivery.confirmBefore1pm: Need to confirm before 1:00 PM today
delivery.cancelledBeforeHandoff: Cancelled before handing over to shipping

payout.window24h: Payout in 24-48 hours after successful delivery

group.title: Create new group
group.description: Set up a new community for members to exchange, share content, and connect around a common topic.

page.title: Create new page
page.description: Create a fanpage for your brand, store, professional, or content project to start posting, receiving followers, and building a public presence.
page.identitySectionTitle: Short, easy to remember, and identifiable page name
page.identitySectionBadge: Good for search, sharing, and public profile
page.identityHint: Name should match the brand, service, or main persona
page.descriptionSectionTitle: Let followers know what you are offering
page.descriptionHint: Tip: specify who the brand is, what target group it serves, and what main content you will post.
page.configurationSectionTitle: Choose a category for the system to target the right audience
page.actionDescription: Once completed, you can add a cover, avatar, CTA, contact info, and your first fanpage welcome post.

nextSteps.step1Desc: Add a cover, avatar, featured intro, and contact information to make the page look more trustworthy.
nextSteps.step2Desc: Depending on your goal, you can enable the message, call, view store, or follow button.
nextSteps.step3Desc: Pin an initial post to let newcomers know what you offer and how to interact with the fanpage.

page.seoDesc: Create a new fanpage on VNSEEA with a name, URL, description, and category, ready for the public page flow.

common.fillDesc: Complete the name, URL, description, and category to get your new {entity} ready to appear on VNSEEA.
common.identityBadge: Displays beautifully in search and sharing
common.introTitleGroup: Clearly describe the goal and target members
common.introTitlePage: Clearly describe the goal and target followers
common.introHint: Tip: specify who the {entity} is for, what the main content is, and the most prominent difference.
common.configTitleGroup: Choose reach and appropriate content group
common.configTitlePage: Choose the category closest to the page main content
common.finishHint: When finished, you can still go back to edit the cover image, description, and {extra}.
common.previewDescDefault: Your new {entity} will have a short description so others can understand the goal, topic, and how to participate.
common.privacyDescDefault: This setting determines who can find and view content in the {entity}.
common.categoryDescDefault: Please choose the category closest to the main topic of the {entity}.

insights.privacyDescDefault: Please choose visibility rights to control who can find and view group content.
insights.finishDesc: You can add a cover, avatar, and featured information right after creating {entity}.
insights.inviteDescGroup: Start with a small group to test the discussion rhythm and initial content.
insights.inviteDescPage: Pull the first follows from your customers, friends, or existing community.
insights.introPostDesc: Pin an opening post so newcomers know what you're sharing and where to start.

readiness.nameDesc: A concise name helps viewers recognize the {entity} theme immediately.
readiness.urlDesc: A clean path makes sharing {entity} easier.
readiness.descDesc: Explain who {entity} is for and what the content will focus on.
readiness.categoryDesc: {entity} will appear in a better context when the right category is chosen.
readiness.privacyDesc: This setting directly affects who can find and view {entity}.

message.label: Message
message.description: Suitable when you want to draw viewers to inbox for direct consultation.

follow.label: Follow
follow.description: Good for content fanpages, brands, or periodic update channels.

catalog.label: View catalog
catalog.description: Used for pages with product catalogs, services, or featured collections.

booking.label: Book now
booking.description: Suitable for studios, experts, classes, or services that need to close scheduled slots.

call.label: Call now
call.description: Suitable for local businesses or teams that need quick responses.

public.label: Public
public.description: Anyone can find the group and view basic content.

private.label: Private
private.description: Group is publicly visible but only members can view posts.

secret.label: Secret
secret.description: Only invited people can see and join the group.

auto.label: Auto & Vehicles
auto.description: For discussions on new cars, maintenance, reviews, and accessories.

business.label: Business
business.description: Focus on collaboration, sales, management, and business development.

technology.label: Technology
technology.description: Suitable for communities interested in software, AI, devices, and programming.

education.label: Education
education.description: Share knowledge, study materials, workshops, and mentoring.

travel.label: Travel
travel.description: Used to organize trips, share schedules, and practical experiences.

marketplace.label: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Suitable for groups exchanging products, deals, and group buying needs.

local-business.label: Local Business
local-business.description: Suitable for shops, studios, eateries, and brands operating locally.

creator.label: Creator & Professional
creator.description: For KOLs, experts, coaches, or people building personal brands.

brand.label: Brand & Product
brand.description: For fanpages introduced products, campaigns, deals, and brand updates.

organization.label: Organization & Community
organization.description: For organizations, clubs, social projects, and community programs.

service.label: Professional Service
service.description: Suitable for agencies, freelancers, service studios, and consulting teams.

groups.title: Groups
groups.descDefault: Manage the groups you follow, see suggestions based on your interests, and quickly start a new community creation flow in the same area.
groups.descSuggested: Discover communities suggested based on your interests, categories you care about, and recent activity in the VNSEEA ecosystem.
groups.descJoined: Return to the groups you have joined to follow new updates, upcoming events, and ongoing discussions.

empty.mineDesc: You haven't created or followed any groups in this account yet. Create a new group to start gathering members, posts, and community activities.
empty.noMatchDesc: Try changing the search keyword or switching to another tab to see more suitable communities.

status.suggestedCount: {count} communities waiting for you to discover

hint.mine: This list shows groups you created or manage. Currently, this account has no communities.
hint.suggested: Groups suggested based on your interests, recent activity, and existing network.
hint.joined: These are the communities you have joined, useful for returning to follow content and new updates.

card.privacyHint: Privacy settings currently applied to this group.

text.pinned: In {group}, everyone is discussing the topic {topic} very actively. This is a pinned post to quickly remind you to include real context for better quality feedback.
text.summary: Quick summary for this week of {group}: {activity}. New members can read this thread to understand hot topics and rules before posting for the first time.
text.detail: A topic of interest in {group}: practical experience, lessons learned, and the best references for tag #{topic}.

settings.title: Settings for {name}
settings.desc: Adjust the display profile, participation rights, and key operating policies of this community.

basics.title: Group Display Profile
basics.desc: Update name, URL, description, and background content to make the group page clearer when members visit.

fields.name: Group Name
fields.descPlaceholder: Describe who this group is for, the main content, and how to participate effectively.
fields.guidelines: Guidelines displayed on the group page
fields.guidelinesPlaceholder: Each line is a principle. Example: Prioritize posts sharing practical context.

controls.title: Privacy and Admin Flow
controls.desc: Set how members see the group, send requests to join, and post content in the community.
controls.noPrivacy: No privacy chosen for the group.

join.label: New Member Approval
join.desc: Admin reviews join requests before entering the group.

post.label: Review Posts Before Displaying
post.desc: New posts need moderator check before going on the feed.

invite.label: Allow Members to Invite Others
invite.desc: Current members can send direct invitations to friends.

directory.label: Display Member Directory
directory.desc: Member list still appears in sidebar and group about page.

welcome.label: Display Welcome Post
welcome.desc: New members will see a pinned post introducing rules and startup resources.

finish.title: Quick Actions
finish.desc: This settings flow is a UI mock. You can go back to the group page or continue tweaking before connecting the API.

sidebar.tip1Desc: New members often decide to join in the first 1-2 sentences of the introduction.
sidebar.tip2Title: Rules should be short and specific
sidebar.tip2Desc: Clearer rules make it easier for moderators to handle posts and join requests.

empty.title: Group to set up not found
empty.desc: This group slug is not in the current mock data. Please go back to the group list and select a valid community.

electric.name: Vietnam EV Community
electric.summary: EV reviews, charging stations, maintenance experience, and sharing real-life vehicle journeys.

guidelines.0: Prioritize real reviews with images or data when sharing experiences.
guidelines.1: Do not post direct sales outside of EV and related accessories topics.
guidelines.2: Keep discussions respectful, focused on solutions and useful knowledge.

founder.name: Founder Circle Vietnam
founder.summary: Space for exchanging operation, growth, and strategy problems for founders, C-levels, and builders.

guidelines.0: Share concisely, go straight to the problem and context needing advice.
guidelines.1: Do not post job recruitments or excessive service offers in the main feed.
guidelines.2: Respect privacy principles regarding internal data shared within the group.

ai.name: AI Product Builders
ai.summary: Focus on AI product, automation, dataset, prompt engineering, and new product demos every week.

guidelines.0: Prioritize demos with images, videos, or prototype links for quick feedback.
guidelines.1: Clearly tag goals: research, case study, prompt, automation, or launch.
guidelines.2: Avoid sharing sensitive customer data and company secret information.

learning.name: Travel & Learn
learning.summary: Group sharing workshops, courses, study materials, and meetup schedules for working professionals.

guidelines.0: Documents posted need to site sources so others can verify and continue learning.
guidelines.1: Encourage sharing short notes, summarizing key insights after each workshop.
guidelines.2: No spamming course links or unrelated affiliate content.

weekend.name: Weekend Escape Club
weekend.summary: Plan short trips, share concise schedules, homestays, and ticket hunting experience.

guidelines.0: When reviewing locations, include cost, travel time, and practical notes.
guidelines.1: Respect the local environment, avoid promoting activities that affect nature.
guidelines.2: Do not post tour hunting information with low credibility or unknown origin.

mocmay.name: Moc May Studio
mocmay.summary: Fanpage introducing wood furniture, home decoration concepts, and construction projects in modern minimalist style.

mobility.name: VNSEEA Mobility Lab
mobility.summary: Page updating research, events, and insights on electrified transport, charging stations, and green mobility infrastructure.

learning.name: Quick Learn Every Day
learning.summary: Fanpage sharing study notes, workshop schedules, and short documents for professionals wanting continuous skill updates.
